kernel_subject: kobject: Add support for default attribute groups to kobj_type
stage1_reason: First commit explicitly references kernel API change from default_attrs to default_groups in kobj_type structure. Second commit adds error handling for dma_set_coherent_mask() return value, indicating API usage pattern change.
stage2_reason: Kernel commit aa30f47cf666 introduces default_groups support in kobj_type, matching driver migration from default_attrs to default_groups in commit 0ac467447dde
